mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID , USER_ID_NM , USER_NM , IFNULL(USER_GB,'D') AS USER_GB, USER_PW, USEYN, IFNULL(DEPT_NM,'') AS DEPT_NM FROM T_ADMIN_MST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOW() BETWEEN START_DATE AND END_DATE

SELECT USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_ID_NM , USER_GB, USER_PW, DEPT_NM, DATE_FORMAT(START_DATE,'%y-%m-%d') AS START_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(END_DATE,'%y-%m-%d') AS END_DATE, BIGO, USEYN FROM T_ADMIN_MST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT TERMS_SEQ ,TERMS_GB ,TERMS_TITLE ,TERMS_CONTS ,USE_YN ,REG_ID ,REG_DTM ,MOD_ID ,MOD_DTM FROM T_SIGN_MST WHERE TERMS_GB = #{termsGb} ORDER BY TERMS_SEQ ASC
SELECT TERMS_SEQ FROM T_SIGN_MST WHERE TERMS_GB = #{termsGb} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY TERMS_SEQ DESC LIMIT 1
